plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize Azure OpenAI py Copilot Local Debug

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" popup within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Teams Agent with Data" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" selection menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Custom" option within the "Select an option to load your data" dropdown menu in the Teams Agent with Data extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Python" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown selection dialog at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder (/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects)" option in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code to select the project root location.
